outlook.summary: Spot at critical gamma inflection (588.0-589.14). Max Pain cluster 584-590 creates magnetic attraction zone. Bearish skew (0DTE/WEEKLY) vs bullish skew (MONTHLY) shows term structure divergence. High put volume at 588 suggests MM hedging activity. Market pinned between structural support 580 and resistance 590.

levels.motivazione: Triple expiry gamma alignment: 0DTE 589.14, WEEKLY 588.01, MONTHLY 588.0. Spot at precise inflection point. Dealers flip from long to short gamma here.
Massive 75.5K OI monthly puts + 82K volume. Highest activity strike across all expiries. MM defensive hedge zone.

10K OI 0DTE + 8.6K OI weekly + 32.6K OI monthly puts. Secondary structural support. High volume 27.5K confirms.

0DTE gamma equilibrium point. Spot at 6621 hovering just 4 points above. Critical intraday pivot - break below triggers dealer selling cascade.
0DTE (6585) and WEEKLY (6580) max pain convergence. MM price magnet for premium optimization, -0.54% from spot creates downward attraction.
Largest 0DTE CALL OI (10988). Primary intraday resistance with elevated volume (109) confirming active interest.
Significant PUT OI: 0DTE 3801, MONTHLY 21906. Secondary support with exceptional 0DTE volume (3675) indicating heavy trading activity.
MONTHLY dual structure: PUT 21735 + CALL 15714. Near spot creates pinning behavior. High OI on both sides = choppy price action.
